root_text.sn46.24:1.1: “Ayoniso, bhikkhave, manasikaroto anuppanno ceva kāmacchando uppajjati, uppanno ca kāmacchando bhiyyobhāvāya vepullāya saṁvattati;
root_text.sn46.24:1.2: anuppanno ceva byāpādo uppajjati, uppanno ca byāpādo bhiyyobhāvāya vepullāya saṁvattati;
root_text.sn46.24:1.3: anuppannañceva thinamiddhaṁ uppajjati, uppannañca thinamiddhaṁ bhiyyobhāvāya vepullāya saṁvattati;
root_text.sn46.24:1.4: anuppannañceva uddhaccakukkuccaṁ uppajjati, uppannañca uddhaccakukkuccaṁ bhiyyobhāvāya vepullāya saṁvattati;
root_text.sn46.24:1.5: anuppannā ceva vicikicchā uppajjati, uppannā ca vicikicchā bhiyyobhāvāya vepullāya saṁvattati;
root_text.sn46.24:1.6: anuppanno ceva satisambojjhaṅgo nuppajjati, uppanno ca satisambojjhaṅgo nirujjhati …pe… anuppanno ceva upekkhāsambojjhaṅgo nuppajjati, uppanno ca upekkhāsambojjhaṅgo nirujjhati.
root_text.sn46.24:2.1: Yoniso ca kho, bhikkhave, manasikaroto anuppanno ceva kāmacchando nuppajjati, uppanno ca kāmacchando pahīyati;
root_text.sn46.24:2.2: anuppanno ceva byāpādo nuppajjati, uppanno ca byāpādo pahīyati;
root_text.sn46.24:2.3: anuppannañceva thinamiddhaṁ nuppajjati, uppannañca thinamiddhaṁ pahīyati;
root_text.sn46.24:2.4: anuppannañceva uddhaccakukkuccaṁ nuppajjati, uppannañca uddhaccakukkuccaṁ pahīyati;
root_text.sn46.24:2.5: anuppannā ceva vicikicchā nuppajjati, uppannā ca vicikicchā pahīyati.
root_text.sn46.24:3.1: Anuppanno ceva satisambojjhaṅgo uppajjati, uppanno ca satisambojjhaṅgo bhāvanāpāripūriṁ gacchati …pe… anuppanno ceva upekkhāsambojjhaṅgo uppajjati, uppanno ca upekkhāsambojjhaṅgo bhāvanāpāripūriṁ gacchatī”ti.

translation_text.sn46.24:1.1: “Mendicants, when you apply the mind irrationally, sensual desire,
translation_text.sn46.24:1.5: and doubt arise, and once arisen they increase and grow.
translation_text.sn46.24:1.6: And the awakening factors of mindfulness, investigation of principles, energy, rapture, tranquility, immersion, and equanimity don’t arise, or if they’ve already arisen, they cease.
translation_text.sn46.24:2.1: When you apply the mind rationally, sensual desire,
translation_text.sn46.24:2.5: and doubt don’t arise, or if they’ve already arisen they’re given up.
translation_text.sn46.24:3.1: And the awakening factors of mindfulness, investigation of principles, energy, rapture, tranquility, immersion, and equanimity arise, and once they’ve arisen, they’re fully developed.”
